title: Lazybank
description: Blocks to store your item and fluid, and get your compound interest!
body:
Lazy Bank - Skip the Grind, Cheat Your Way to Modpack Endgame [Secret Modpack Addon]
 
# 📚Backstory
Let’s be real—modpack creators always add renewable methods for raw materials: bees, crops, machines, or clever recipe tweaks. But in today’s fast-paced gaming, slow late-game resource regeneration drags out your modpack completion, and spamming machines just causes lag and performance hits 🤬. Thankfully, as a psionically ascended tycoon, you don’t need to grind—lend usury to higher-dimensional beings, and they’ll reward you with billions of resources in return!
 
# ✅Versions Supports
1.19.2Forge--3.16--NO FLUID SUPPORT😭

1.20.1Forge--4.6--FLUID UPDATED😀

1.21.1NeoForge--4.6--FLUID UPDATED😀

# 🔧Mod Features
## 📦Store Items & Fluids, Earn Interest
This is your perfect "secret addon" for modded modpacks! Store 1024 of the same item or 1024B of the same fluid, and you’ll earn interest every 100 game ticks. Use the Lazybank to store items (place them in the GUI) and the Lazybank (fluid) to store fluids (inject directly into the block).
Interest is calculated using exponentiation (default rate: 0.002, or 0.2%)—pure compound interest to make your resources snowball!
Left-clicking the Lazybank block directly will clear all its data. Sneak + right-click with an empty hand to pick up the Lazybank with its save data intact.
Too hard or not challenging enough? Enter /lazybankconfig in cheat mode to open the GUI for debugging—changes only apply to your current save!
 
## 🗳️What Items & Fluids Can You Store?
Balance Mode is enabled by default and can only be disabled in the config GUI (cheat mode required). When enabled, only "single-word items" (items whose registry name has no "_" after the ":") and most compressed blocks (e.g., diamond blocks, steel blocks, certus quartz blocks—based on tags) can be stored and recognized.
When Balance Mode is disabled, ALL items can be stored. Compressed blocks require only 1/8 of the default minimum deposit (1024), but due to algorithm limitations, your balance needs to reach 500 for auto-withdrawal. There are no strict restrictions on fluids—minimum deposit is 1024B by default.
 
## 💴Time to Withdraw!
For the Lazybank: Click the withdraw button to toggle auto-withdrawal. Withdrawn items will be automatically injected into vanilla chests or barrels below the block (Version 3.5+ only).
For the Lazybank (fluid): Place the block above a fluid tank, and it will automatically inject the bound fluid into the tank.
Withdrawal speed is determined by your balance, designed to keep your balance dynamically stable.
 
## 😀Usage...

![inserting the items into drawers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b75f8c97425d5e7be814c0b5a752f28e22a7493f.png)
![start the Create steam engine easily](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9503532b2e1ab84b0377cd8601d6bbc3941588ef_0.webp)

Let’s be honest—he could’ve just made a creative drawer, but he had to add all these twists and turns. 

WARNING: This mod is made specifically as a secret addon for hard-core nested modpacks. It’s perfect for late-game players tired of lag and messy production lines—but it’s EXTREMELY unbalanced. If your modpack crashes after adding this mod, DO NOT contact the modpack author.
